title: aeluropus littoralis subsp. micrantherus
intro: Aeluropus littoralis subsp. micrantherus, also known as dwarf salt grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Aeluropus littoralis subsp. micrantherus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat wounds, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal tea, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
